subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath caused all things to speak forth. Verily, there is no God but Him. He hath ever been sanctified above all contingent beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انطق کلشیء انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن الممکنات و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
